items: Timeline: year grouping + collapse + tap-to-expand events
Money: donut chart (income) + bar chart (expenses) always visible
Goals: SVG progress rings on all 6 goals
Ask Phoebe: persistent search/chat bar on every panel
Family avatars: distinct colors per person (Dan/Minako/Koko/Issa/Mother)
Warm dark mode (sage-tinted, not pure black)
Fix: sidebar navigation — accordion behavior, auto-expand groups
Fix: mobile 5-tab bottom nav (was 4-column, Chat tab off-screen)
Fix: FAB hidden on mobile (was overlapping chat send button)
Version display + changelog in Settings panel
Bento grid home layout with 10 card types
